error.heading: Something went wrong
error.hint: An unexpected error occurred. You can try reloading the app.

login.subtitle: Social VR Companion
login.disclaimer: Connects to VRChat on your behalf. Your credentials are stored securely on this device.

error.invalidCredentials: Incorrect username or password. Please try again.
error.networkError: Couldn't reach VRChat. Check your connection and try again.
error.invalid2faCode: Incorrect verification code. Please try again.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

twoFactor.promptTotp: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code.
twoFactor.promptEmail: Enter the code sent to your email address.
